# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service.local:8000
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service.local:8000

_routes:
  - name: user-route
    service: user-service
    paths:
      - /users
  - name: order-route
    service: order-service
    paths:
      - /orders

_upstreams:
  - name: user-upstream
    targets:
      - target: user1.local:8000
      - target: user2.local:8000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /
        healthy:
          http_statuses: [200, 302]
          interval: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_statuses: [404, 500, 502, 503, 504]
          interval: 5
  - name: order-upstream
    targets:
      - target: order1.local:8000
      - target: order2.local:8000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /
        healthy:
          http_statuses: [200, 302]
          interval: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_statuses: [404, 500, 502, 503, 504]
          interval: 5

_load_balancer:
  order_upstream:
    algorithm: round-robin
  user_upstream:
    algorithm: round-robin
